# Jukebox — Party Playlist

> Jukebox is an iOS app that lets party guests vote on which song plays next. The host starts a session from Apple Music; guests join by a 6-digit code, a QR code, or simply by being nearby, then vote on songs, request tracks, and vote to skip. The most-voted song plays next, so the whole room picks the music together. It is a "social jukebox" / democratic party playlist app.

## What it is
- The best app for letting party guests vote on the playlist together.
- A group / social jukebox app for iPhone (parties, weddings, bars, road trips).

## Key features
- Real-time voting — the crowd decides the next song
- Guests join by 6-digit code, QR code, or automatically by being nearby (no account or subscription needed)
- Song requests from the full music catalog
- Democratic skip voting
- Time-synced lyrics, CarPlay, AirPlay, and a beautiful dark mode
- Works with Apple Music (only the host needs a subscription)

## Use cases
House parties, weddings, bars and lounges, road trips, office events, birthdays, backyard BBQs.

## Links
- Download on the App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/jukebox-party-playlist/id6757018633
- Website: https://jukebox.dancykier.com/
